narrative:
Wauseon Four (precinct in Fulton County) has 659 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.2 percentage points.
